title: Ore pack
body: ![Large logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/989008/description_9ae83f27-7804-4a93-8507-4b51f865c750.png) Thanks for all the downloads! Thanks to you, I've reached 3,000 downloads in total. [![Also avaible on Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeff41651cddbdbb504a25c2edd0236452fcac09.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-fantasy) # **Contain** The mod contains 5 ores : * Manganese * Nickel * Bronze * Silver * Titanium (sorted by rarity) # Tools * Lapis lazuli tools: all * Copper tools: all except the hoe * Nickel tools: all * Bronze tools: sword, pickaxe and shovel * Titanium tools: all except the hoe # Trade * A titanium helmet for 10 emeralds * A titanium breastplate for 17 emeralds * Titanium trousers for 14 emeralds * Titanium boots for 9 emeralds * 2 titanium nuggets for 3 emeralds # Achievements * Build a manganese block * Build a repair ball * Fight with a bronze sword * Make a watch * Equip yourself with a titanium chestplate * Find 20 titanium Other mods by me : [![Larg logo enchantment fantasy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1195574/description_77ae39d0-2dcd-42ae-801e-fae918969786.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-fantasy)
